subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Hearken thou unto My Call from the precincts of My Throne. Verily, it draweth thee unto My Kingdom and showeth thee My signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ورقتی ان استمعی ندائی من شطر عرشی انه یجذبک الی ملکوتی و یریک من آیاتی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
